_README: Outcomes recorded against the regex-stub verifier (api/_woogoros-verifier.js). When Theia's receipt LoRA replaces the stub (~mid-May 2026), expectations should improve: the FAIL on auto-paper-photo and the REVIEWs on the HVAC fixtures should turn into PASS or stay REVIEW depending on Theia's classification. Update this file when Theia drops to lock the new baseline.

hvac-clean-invoice.jpeg._note: Clean digital screenshot. Verifier today MISSES total ('Total job price $610.00' — TOTAL_RE doesn't match compound labels). Subtotal extracts cleanly. No date in screenshot. Lands REVIEW because trust low (49) without total bonus or date bonus.

hvac-coil-quote.jpeg._note: Clean digital. Verifier extracts total + subtotal cleanly. No date in screenshot, no merchant heuristic match — trust 66, just under PASS threshold. REVIEW.

auto-paper-photo.jpeg._note: Real phone photo of paper estimate. OCR works. Verifier MISSES total ('Total Cost of Repairs 732.39' — same compound-label bug as the HVAC one). KEYWORDS.auto_repair doesn't match the receipt's accounting language ('Body Labor / Subtotal / Total Cost of Repairs') — vertical_mismatch fatal. FAIL.

audi-screenshot.jpg._note: Partial screenshot — user scrolled, no total in the visible region. Verifier finds nothing. False-positive merchant heuristic on 'FRONT AND REAR ALIGNMENT'. REVIEW because trust 54 (no total/date bonus). Correct outcome — admin should look at this.
